Sunlit bracers 30386(1) sunlight_cuffs
params {'0': 10, '1': 10, '2': 10, '3': 6, '4': 18, '5': 12, '6': 12, '7': 12, '8': 6, '9': 12, '10': 8, '189': 4, '2059': 'Two bracers that provide a divine connection to the Sun God.

6260(1) {'879': 'Rune Saviour', '880': 'You gain the <col=ffffff>Rune Saviour</col> perk. Magic spells no longer require or consume Runes. This includes charges when using powered staves or tomes such as the Tome of Fire, Trident of the Seas, Trident of the Swamp, Sanguinesti Staff and the Enchanted Slayer Staff.', '1855': 0}
6261(1) {'879': 'Minimum Potential', '880': 'You gain the <col=ffffff>Minimum Potential</col> perk. Your Melee, Ranged & Magic hits will never deal below 5 damage.', '1855': 0}
6262(1) {'879': 'Spiky Aura', '880': 'You gain the <col=ffffff>Spiky Aura</col> perk. Whenever you take damage you'll reflect at least 25% of the damage received. This effect stacks with other recoil effects.', '1855': 0}
6263(1) {'879': 'Bottomless Brew', '880': 'You gain the <col=ffffff>Bottomless Brew</col> perk.
Potions will no longer be consumed when you drink them.', '1855': 0}
6264(1) {'879': 'Exposure', '880': 'You gain the <col=ffffff>Exposure</col> perk. Special attacks have a 50% chance to deal 50% more damage.', '1855': 0}

1116(1)
params {'879': 'Production Prodigy', '880': '- When doing the following activities, all items are processed at once:

- Smelting ores, Smithing bars (does not work with the Superheat item spell) and making Cannonballs.

- Fletching logs, stringing Bows and cutting bolt tips.

- Cleaning herbs and making Potions which do not have a stackable secondary ingredient.

- Cooking food and making Jugs of Wine.

- Crafting leather, uncut gems, glassblowing, jewellery, pottery, Battlestaves and spinning flax or wool.

- Full XP is given for items processed using this Relic.

- There is a 25% chance that you will make an extra product, which will be sent to your Bank if you have space. The additional product will also grant XP.

- Additionally Crafting, Smithing, Herblore, Fletching and Cooking are boosted by +12.', '881': 5310, '882': 5419, '883': 5337, '884': 5283, '885': 0, '1853': 5364, '1854': 5392}		 {'879': 'Production Prodigy', '880': '- When doing the following activities, all items are processed at once:

- Smelting ores, Smithing bars (does not work with the Superheat item spell) and making Cannonballs.

- Fletching logs, stringing Bows and cutting bolt tips.

- Making headless arrows, regular arrows, bolts, darts, and javelins (capped at 10x the regular amount per action).

- Cleaning herbs and making Potions which do not have a stackable secondary ingredient.

- Cooking food and making Jugs of Wine.

- Crafting leather, uncut gems, glassblowing, jewellery, pottery, Battlestaves and spinning flax or wool.

- Full XP is given for items processed using this Relic.

- There is a 25% chance that you will make an extra product, which will be sent to your Bank if you have space. The additional product will also grant XP.

- Additionally Crafting, Smithing, Herblore, Fletching and Cooking are boosted by +12.', '881': 5310, '882': 5419, '883': 5337, '884': 5283, '885': 0, '1853': 5364, '1854': 5392}
1117(1)
params {'879': 'Power Miner', '880': '- This pickaxe will act as an non-degradable variant of the crystal equivalent with no requirements.

- When this item is in your inventory or equipped, you gain the following benefits:

- On failing to mine a rock, you will have a separate 50% chance to succeed.

- Items gathered from Mining are automatically sent to your Bank.

- The Echo Pickaxe will cause the rock to not deplete until you have mined 4 ore.

- This buff does stack with the existing Mining Gloves, with a cap of 7 ores from a given node.

You will be able to toggle the following effects on or off for the Pickaxe:

- Collected ores are automatically smelted and grant Smithing XP (regardless of your smithing level.)

- Gems gathered from Mining are automatically cut and grant Crafting XP regardless of your Crafting level.', '881': 5988, '882': 6097, '883': 6015, '884': 5961, '885': 0, '1853': 6042, '1854': 6070, '1855': 1, '2049': 25112}		 {'879': 'Power Miner', '880': '- This pickaxe will act as a non-degradable variant of the crystal equivalent with no requirements.

- When this item is in your inventory or equipped, you gain the following perks:

- On failing to mine a rock, you will have a separate 50% chance to succeed.

- Items gathered from Mining are automatically sent to your Bank.

- The Echo Pickaxe will cause the rock to not deplete until you have mined 4 ore.

- This buff does stack with the existing Mining Gloves, with a cap of 7 ores from a given node.

You will be able to toggle the following effects on or off for the Pickaxe:

- Collected ores are automatically smelted and grant Smithing XP (regardless of your smithing level).

- Gems gathered from Mining are automatically cut and grant Crafting XP regardless of your Crafting level.', '881': 5988, '882': 6097, '883': 6015, '884': 5961, '885': 0, '1853': 6042, '1854': 6070, '1855': 1, '2049': 25112}
1118(1)
params {'879': 'Animal Wrangler', '880': '- This harpoon will act as an non-degradable variant of the crystal equivalent with no requirements.

- When this item is in your inventory or equipped, you gain the following benefits:

- On failing to fish a spot, you will have a separate 50% chance to succeed.

- Items gathered from Fishing are automatically sent to your Bank.

- Fish caught have a 50% chance to be automatically cooked, granting Cooking experience regardless of level requirements.

- Attempt to catch fish 1 tick faster.

- It will also work for fish that don't require a harpoon to be caught, and your harpoon can be substituted as a Net, Big Net, Lobster Pot, or any Rod whilst Fishing.

Alongside the Echo harpoon effects you will get the following benefits to <col=ffffff>Hunter</col>:

- Hunter catching will never fail.

- Box traps catch chinchompas faster.

- Chinchompas are doubled when caught, also giving double XP.

- Impling jars no longer break upon opening them.

Lastly, you never burn food when Cooking.', '881': 5989, '882': 6098, '883': 6016, '884': 5962, '885': 0, '1853': 6043, '1854': 6071, '1855': 1, '2049': 25114}		 {'879': 'Animal Wrangler', '880': '- This harpoon will act as a non-degradable variant of the crystal equivalent with no requirements.

- When this item is in your inventory or equipped, you gain the following perks:

- On failing to fish a spot, you will have a separate 50% chance to succeed.

- Items gathered from Fishing are automatically sent to your Bank.

- Fish caught have a 50% chance to be automatically cooked, granting Cooking experience regardless of level requirements.

- Attempt to catch fish 1 tick faster.

- It will also work for fish that don't require a harpoon to be caught, and your harpoon can be substituted as a Net, Big Net, Lobster Pot, or any Rod whilst Fishing.

Alongside the Echo harpoon effects you will get the following perks to <col=ffffff>Hunter</col>:

- Hunter catching will never fail.

- Box traps catch chinchompas faster.

- Chinchompas are doubled when caught, also giving double XP.

- Impling jars no longer break upon opening them.

Lastly, you never burn food when Cooking.', '881': 5989, '882': 6098, '883': 6016, '884': 5962, '885': 0, '1853': 6043, '1854': 6071, '1855': 1, '2049': 25114}
1119(1)
params {'879': 'Lumberjack', '880': '- This axe will act as an non-degradable variant of the crystal equivalent with no requirements.

- When this item is in your inventory or equipped, you gain the following benefits:

- On failing to chop a tree, you will have a separate 50% chance to succeed.

- Items gathered from Woodcutting are automatically sent to your Bank.

You will be able to toggle the following effects on or off for the Axe:

- Automatically burning logs for Firemaking XP (regardless of your Firemaking level.)

- Automatically Fletching logs into arrowshafts for Fletching XP (regardless of your Fletching level.).

Additionally, you gain the following benefits to <col=ffffff>Firemaking</col>:

- Never fail to make fires with any logs at any Firemaking level.', '881': 5990, '882': 6099, '883': 6017, '884': 5963, '885': 0, '1853': 6044, '1854': 6072, '1855': 1, '2049': 25110}		 {'879': 'Lumberjack', '880': '- This axe will act as a non-degradable variant of the crystal equivalent with no requirements.

- When this item is in your inventory or equipped, you gain the following perks:

- On failing to chop a tree, you will have a separate 50% chance to succeed.

- Items gathered from Woodcutting are automatically sent to your Bank.

You will be able to toggle the following effects on or off for the Axe:

- Automatically burning logs for Firemaking XP (regardless of your Firemaking level).

- Automatically Fletching logs into arrowshafts for Fletching XP (regardless of your Fletching level).

Additionally, you gain the following perks to <col=ffffff>Firemaking</col>:

- Never fail to make fires with any logs at any Firemaking level.', '881': 5990, '882': 6099, '883': 6017, '884': 5963, '885': 0, '1853': 6044, '1854': 6072, '1855': 1, '2049': 25110}
1123(1)
params {'879': 'Corner Cutter', '880': '- While equipped, Sage's Greaves will grant Agility XP based on your Agility level while you run.

- Completing an Agility course grants two completion count and 25% bonus XP.

- 100% success rate on all Agility checks.

- Marks of Grace will also spawn with 10, 000 coins.

- Double Quantity of Pyramid Tops, Hallowed Marks and Agility Vouchers, and Crystal shards (From agility)', '881': 5994, '882': 6103, '883': 6021, '884': 5967, '885': 1, '1853': 6048, '1854': 6076, '1855': 1, '2049': 28771}		 {'879': 'Corner Cutter', '880': '- While equipped, Sage's Greaves will grant Agility XP based on your Agility level while you run.

- Completing an Agility course grants two completion count and 25% bonus XP.

- 100% success rate on all Agility checks.

- Marks of Grace will also spawn with 10, 000 coins.

- Double Quantity of Pyramid Tops, Hallowed Marks and Agility Vouchers, and Crystal shards (from agility).', '881': 5994, '882': 6103, '883': 6021, '884': 5967, '885': 1, '1853': 6048, '1854': 6076, '1855': 1, '2049': 28771}
1124(1)
params {'879': 'Friendly Forager', '880': '- This item will provide the following benefits whilst in your inventory or equipped:

- When you gather resources from Woodcutting, Fishing, Mining and Hunting, the Forager's Pouch will find and store a random grimy herb, limited to herbs your herblore level + 25 can clean, whilst also providing a small amount of token XP when one is found.

- The Forager's Pouch will only find herbs it has room to store, but will always attempt to give you a herb you can receive.

- The Forager's Pouch works just like a Herb Sack, and shares an inventory with it.

Additionally, you gain the following benefits to <col=ffffff>Herblore</col> when crafting potions:

- Secondary ingredients have a 90% chance to not be consumed. This stacks additively with other sources.

- Created potions contain 4 doses instead of 3.', '881': 5995, '882': 6104, '883': 6022, '884': 5968, '885': 1, '1853': 6049, '1854': 6077, '1855': 1, '2049': 30357}		 {'879': 'Friendly Forager', '880': '- This item will provide the following perks whilst in your inventory or equipped:

- When you gather resources from Woodcutting, Fishing, Mining and Hunting, the Forager's Pouch will find and store a random grimy herb, limited to herbs your herblore level + 25 can clean, whilst also providing a small amount of token XP when one is found.

- The Forager's Pouch will only find herbs it has room to store, but will always attempt to give you a herb you can receive.

- The Forager's Pouch works just like a Herb Sack, and shares an inventory with it.

Additionally, you gain the following perks to <col=ffffff>Herblore</col> when crafting potions:

- Secondary ingredients have a 90% chance to not be consumed. This stacks additively with other sources.

- Created potions contain 4 doses instead of 3.', '881': 5995, '882': 6104, '883': 6022, '884': 5968, '885': 1, '1853': 6049, '1854': 6077, '1855': 1, '2049': 30357}
1125(1)
params {'879': 'Dodgy Deals', '880': 'You gain the following benefits to <col=ffffff>Thieving</col>:

- Pickpocketing an NPC will also pickpocket all NPCs of similar type in a 11x11 square, granting extra loot for each NPC pickpocketed.

- 100% success rate on all Thieving checks.

- Automatically re-pickpocket an NPC or stall until you can no longer do so.

- Items obtained from pickpocketing are noted.

- Maximum coin pouch count increased by 3x.

- Stalls do not deplete when you steal from them.', '881': 5996, '882': 6105, '883': 6023, '884': 5969, '885': 1, '1853': 6050, '1854': 6078, '1855': 0}		 {'879': 'Dodgy Deals', '880': 'You gain the following perks to <col=ffffff>Thieving</col>:

- Pickpocketing an NPC will also pickpocket all NPCs of similar type in a 11x11 square, granting extra loot for each NPC pickpocketed.

- 100% success rate on all Thieving checks.

- Automatically re-pickpocket an NPC or stall until you can no longer do so.

- Items obtained from pickpocketing are noted.

- Maximum coin pouch count increased by 3x.

- Stalls do not deplete when you steal from them.', '881': 5996, '882': 6105, '883': 6023, '884': 5969, '885': 1, '1853': 6050, '1854': 6078, '1855': 0}
1128(1)
params {'879': 'Treasure Arbiter', '880': 'You gain the following benefits when <col=ffffff>Clue Hunting</col>:

- Sources of clues are now a 1/15 chance.

- Clue Geodes, Clue Nests and Clue Bottles are found 10x more often.

- All Clue Scrolls have the lowest number of steps possible for their tier.

- Emote, Falo and Charlie Clue steps no longer have item requirements.

- Every Clue Scroll casket will roll the max amount of rewards it can give. It can roll the same item more than once. :
- Beginner caskets will roll 3 times.
- Easy caskets will roll 4 times.
- Medium caskets will roll 5 times.
- Hard caskets will roll 6 times.
- Elite caskets will roll 6 times.
- Master caskets will roll 7 times.', '881': 6000, '882': 6109, '883': 6027, '884': 5973, '885': 4, '1853': 6054, '1854': 6082, '1855': 0}		 {'879': 'Treasure Arbiter', '880': 'You gain the following perks when <col=ffffff>Clue Hunting</col>:

- Sources of clues are now a 1/15 chance.

- Clue Geodes, Clue Nests and Clue Bottles are found 10x more often.

- All Clue Scrolls have the lowest number of steps possible for their tier.

- Emote, Falo and Charlie Clue steps no longer have item requirements.

- Every Clue Scroll casket will roll the max amount of rewards it can give. It can roll the same item more than once. :
- Beginner caskets will roll 3 times.
- Easy caskets will roll 4 times.
- Medium caskets will roll 5 times.
- Hard caskets will roll 6 times.
- Elite caskets will roll 6 times.
- Master caskets will roll 7 times.', '881': 6000, '882': 6109, '883': 6027, '884': 5973, '885': 4, '1853': 6054, '1854': 6082, '1855': 0}
1129(1)
params {'879': 'Slayer Master', '880': 'You gain the following benefits to <col=ffffff>Slayer</col>:

- Always on task for all eligible slayer monsters.

- Unlock all Slayer Task perks for free.

- Rune Pouches, Herb Sacks and Looting Bags in the Slayer Point store are all free.

- Skip and block Tasks for free.

- Gain 1000-15, 000 bonus Slayer XP for the first time you kill the 100th of each unique Slayer monster, scaled by the monster's Slayer level requirement (XP stated is before multipliers).', '881': 6002, '882': 6111, '883': 6029, '884': 5975, '885': 4, '1853': 6056, '1854': 6084, '1855': 0}		 {'879': 'Slayer Master', '880': 'You gain the following perks to <col=ffffff>Slayer</col>:

- Always on task for all eligible slayer monsters.

- Unlock all Slayer Task perks for free.

- Rune Pouches, Herb Sacks and Looting Bags in the Slayer Point store are all free.

- Skip and block Tasks for free.

- Gain 1000-15, 000 bonus Slayer XP for the first time you kill the 100th of each unique Slayer monster, scaled by the monster's Slayer level requirement (XP stated is before multipliers).', '881': 6002, '882': 6111, '883': 6029, '884': 5975, '885': 4, '1853': 6056, '1854': 6084, '1855': 0}
1131(1)
params {'879': 'Golden God', '880': 'You gain the following benefits to the <col=ffffff>High and Low Alchemy spells</col>:

- The spells have no rune cost or level requirement.

- Items give 15% more gold, and have a 65% chance to not be consumed.

- When cast on a stack of items, the spells will automatically be recast over time, until the stack is depleted or moved.

You gain the following benefits to <col=ffffff>Prayer</col>:

- 20, 000 Coins can be offered at Prayer altars in exchange for Prayer XP equivalent to using a dragon bone. This respects altar XP modifiers. Normal altars have no modifiers.

- All items purchased from some select shops can be noted, provided the item can be noted at all.
- There will be a new button on select shops which toggles this effect.', '881': 6005, '882': 6114, '883': 6032, '884': 5978, '885': 3, '1853': 6059, '1854': 6087, '1855': 0}		 {'879': 'Golden God', '880': 'You gain the following perks to the <col=ffffff>High and Low Alchemy spells</col>:

- The spells have no rune cost or level requirement.

- Items give 15% more gold, and have a 65% chance to not be consumed.

- When cast on a stack of items, the spells will automatically be recast over time, until the stack is depleted or moved.

You gain the following perks to <col=ffffff>Prayer</col>:

- 20, 000 Coins can be offered at Prayer altars in exchange for Prayer XP equivalent to using a dragon bone. This respects altar XP modifiers. Normal altars have no modifiers.

- All items purchased from some select shops can be noted, provided the item can be noted at all.
- There will be a new button on select shops which toggles this effect.', '881': 6005, '882': 6114, '883': 6032, '884': 5978, '885': 3, '1853': 6059, '1854': 6087, '1855': 0}
1132(1)
params {'879': 'Grimoire', '880': '- This item can be used to freely swap between spellbooks.

- The Grimoire acts as a Book of the Dead.

Additionally, when you select this relic, you will unlock access to all Prayers and spells, regardless of area, quest, or diary requirements.', '881': 6006, '882': 6115, '883': 6033, '884': 5979, '885': 6, '1853': 6060, '1854': 6088, '1855': 1, '2049': 26551}		 {'879': 'Grimoire', '880': '- This item can be used to freely swap between spellbooks.

- The Grimoire acts as a Book of the Dead.

Additionally, when you select this, you will unlock access to all Prayers and spells, regardless of area, quest, or diary requirements.', '881': 6006, '882': 6115, '883': 6033, '884': 5979, '885': 6, '1853': 6060, '1854': 6088, '1855': 1, '2049': 26551}
1133(1)
params {'879': 'Overgrown', '880': '- This item can be used to access the Seed Vault from anywhere in the world.

Additionally, you gain the following benefits to <col=ffffff>Farming</col>:

- Crops never die.

- When planting a seed, it has a 75% chance to not be consumed.

- When a seed fully grows, if your Seed Vault has another seed of the same type it will harvest the patch for you, then replant the seed. (Only works whilst online)', '881': 6007, '882': 6116, '883': 6034, '884': 5980, '885': 6, '1853': 6061, '1854': 6089, '1855': 1, '2049': 30359}		 {'879': 'Overgrown', '880': '- This item can be used to access the Seed Vault from anywhere in the world.

Additionally, you gain the following perks to <col=ffffff>Farming</col>:

- Crops never die.

- When planting a seed, it has a 75% chance to not be consumed.

- When a seed fully grows, if your Seed Vault has another seed of the same type it will harvest the patch for you, then replant the seed. (Only works whilst online)', '881': 6007, '882': 6116, '883': 6034, '884': 5980, '885': 6, '1853': 6061, '1854': 6089, '1855': 1, '2049': 30359}
1134(1)
params {'879': 'Specialist', '880': 'You gain the following benefits to <col=ffffff>special attacks</col>:

- All special attacks cost 20% and have +100% accuracy.

- For each failed accuracy roll with a special attack, gain 10% Special Attack Energy.

- Whenever you kill an NPC, restore 15% Special Attack Energy.', '881': 6008, '882': 6117, '883': 6035, '884': 5981, '885': 7, '1853': 6062, '1854': 6090, '1855': 0}		 {'879': 'Specialist', '880': 'You gain the following perks to <col=ffffff>special attacks</col>:

- All special attacks cost 20% and have +100% accuracy.

- For each failed accuracy roll with a special attack, gain 10% Special Attack Energy.

- Whenever you kill an NPC, restore 15% Special Attack Energy.', '881': 6008, '882': 6117, '883': 6035, '884': 5981, '885': 7, '1853': 6062, '1854': 6090, '1855': 0}
1135(1)
params {'879': 'Last Stand', '880': 'You gain the <col=ffffff>Last Stand</col> ability, which works as follows:

- If damage would reduce you to 0 hp, you are reduced to 1 hp instead.

- Your combat stats are instantly boosted to 255 but begin draining rapidly back down to their base level + 15.

- For the next 16 ticks after this ability is activated, you cannot be reduced to 0 HP.

- When the effect ends, all incoming damage is nullified and the player is healed based on the damage they dealt over the last 16 ticks.

Once this ability is used, it cannot be used again until you die or 3 minutes have passed.', '881': 6010, '882': 6119, '883': 6037, '884': 5983, '885': 7, '1853': 6064, '1854': 6092, '1855': 0}		 {'879': 'Last Stand', '880': 'You gain the <col=ffffff>Last Stand</col> perk, which works as follows:

- If damage would reduce you to 0 hp, you are reduced to 1 hp instead.

- Your combat stats are instantly boosted to 255 but begin draining rapidly back down to their base level + 15.

- For the next 16 ticks after this ability is activated, you cannot be reduced to 0 HP.

- When the effect ends, all incoming damage is nullified and the player is healed based on the damage they dealt over the last 16 ticks.

Once this ability is used, it cannot be used again until you die or 3 minutes have passed.', '881': 6010, '882': 6119, '883': 6037, '884': 5983, '885': 7, '1853': 6064, '1854': 6092, '1855': 0}
1164(1)
params {'2026': 'Magic VI', '2027': 5, '2028': 'Max hit with <col=0xffffff>Magic</col> is increased by 1% for every 100 Hitpoints remaining on target (Up to 10%)
On a successful <col=0xffffff>Magic</col> hit, If your target has less health than your max hit, you max hit.', '2031': 6216, '2032': 6234, '2033': 6180, '2034': 6198, '2035': 6144, '2036': 6258}		 {'2026': 'Magic VI', '2027': 5, '2028': 'Max hit with <col=0xffffff>Magic</col> is increased by 1% for every 100 Hitpoints remaining on target (Up to 10%).
On a successful <col=0xffffff>Magic</col> hit, if your target has less health than your max hit, you max hit.', '2031': 6216, '2032': 6234, '2033': 6180, '2034': 6198, '2035': 6144, '2036': 6258}
1166(1)
params {'2026': 'Melee II', '2027': 3, '2028': '<col=0xffffff>Melee</col> hits have a 10% chance to generate an echo hit.
(Additional melee hit, 50% max-hit, respects Accuracy, PvM only)', '2031': 6200, '2032': 6218, '2033': 6164, '2034': 6182, '2035': 6128, '2036': 6242}		 {'2026': 'Melee II', '2027': 3, '2028': '<col=0xffffff>Melee</col> hits have a 10% chance to generate an echo hit
(additional melee hit, 50% max-hit, respects Accuracy, PvM only).', '2031': 6200, '2032': 6218, '2033': 6164, '2034': 6182, '2035': 6128, '2036': 6242}
1176(1)
params {'2026': 'Ranged VI', '2027': 4, '2028': 'Never miss with <col=0xffffff>Ranged</col> (PvM only.).', '2031': 6210, '2032': 6228, '2033': 6174, '2034': 6192, '2035': 6138, '2036': 6252} {'2026': 'Ranged VI', '2027': 4, '2028': 'Never miss with <col=0xffffff>Ranged</col> (PvM only).', '2031': 6210, '2032': 6228, '2033': 6174, '2034': 6192, '2035': 6138, '2036': 6252}
1725(1)
params {'879': 'Fairy's Flight', '880': '- This item will allow you to <col=ffffff>Teleport</col> to any fairy ring, spirit tree, or tool leprechaun.

- Unlocking this Relic will autocomplete the Tree Gnome Village quest.

- This item ignores wilderness teleport restrictions.

- This item cannot be used to teleport to an area you haven't unlocked.', '881': 5991, '882': 6100, '883': 6018, '884': 5964, '885': 2, '1274': 3062, '1853': 6045, '1854': 6073, '1855': 1, '2049': 25102}		 {'879': 'Fairy's Flight', '880': '- This item will allow you to <col=ffffff>Teleport</col> to any fairy ring, spirit tree, or tool leprechaun.

- Unlocking this will autocomplete the Tree Gnome Village quest.

- This item ignores wilderness teleport restrictions.

- This item cannot be used to teleport to an area you haven't unlocked.', '881': 5991, '882': 6100, '883': 6018, '884': 5964, '885': 2, '1274': 3062, '1853': 6045, '1854': 6073, '1855': 1, '2049': 25102}
1737(1)
params {'879': 'Draining Strikes', '880': '- All of your attacks have 10% increased accuracy and 10% increased damage.

- Whenever one of your attacks successfully hits, there is a 50% chance that you will restore your Hitpoints and Prayer by 10% of the damage dealt. (Rounded up)

- This Relic does not work for multi-target attacks or Special Attacks.

- This Relic's restoration effect will work with the Scythe of Vitur's initial hit, however, it will only work for its secondary hits if those hits have the same target as the initial hit. ', '881': 2682, '883': 2683, '884': 2634, '885': 5, '1274': 3074}		 {'879': 'Draining Strikes', '880': '- All of your attacks have 10% increased accuracy and 10% increased damage.

- Whenever one of your attacks successfully hits, there is a 50% chance that you will restore your Hitpoints and Prayer by 10% of the damage dealt. (Rounded up)

- This Relic does not work for multi-target attacks or Special Attacks.

- This Relic's restoration effect will work with the Scythe of Vitur's initial hit, however, it will only work for its secondary hits if those hits have the same target as the initial hit. ', '881': 2682, '883': 2683, '884': 2634, '885': 5, '1274': 3074}
4728(1)
params {'879': 'Guardian', '880': '- This item will allow you to summon a powerful <col=ffffff>Guardian Thrall</col>, lasting 30 minutes.

- The guardian will attack your target with whatever style it is weak to.

- When you are in multi-combat it will cast an AoE attack if the target is weak to range or magic.

- The Guardian's stats are:
- Min hit: 5
- Max hit: 13
- Attack Speed: 4
- Accuracy: 45000

- The Guardian does not work in PvP.

- This relic will also work inside The Gauntlet.', '881': 6009, '882': 6118, '883': 6036, '884': 5982, '885': 7, '1274': 4711, '1853': 6063, '1854': 6091, '1855': 1, '2049': 28769}		 {'879': 'Guardian', '880': '- This item will allow you to summon a powerful <col=ffffff>Guardian Thrall</col>, lasting 30 minutes.

- The guardian will attack your target with whatever style it is weak to.

- When you are in multi-combat it will cast an AoE attack if the target is weak to range or magic.

- The Guardian's stats are:
- Min hit: 5
- Max hit: 13
- Attack Speed: 4
- Accuracy: 45000

- The Guardian does not work in PvP.

- This perk will also work inside The Gauntlet.', '881': 6009, '882': 6118, '883': 6036, '884': 5982, '885': 7, '1274': 4711, '1853': 6063, '1854': 6091, '1855': 1, '2049': 28769}
5892(1)

6946 reward_xp_boost_all_200 122 [[+200% XP], [Increase XP gain by 200% for all skills.], None, [6749], None, [200], None, None, None, None, None, None, None, None, None, None]
6947 reward_power_miner 122 [[Power Miner], [- This pickaxe will act as a non-degradable variant of the crystal equivalent with no requirements.

- When this item is in your inventory or equipped, you gain the following perks:

- On failing to mine a rock, you will have a separate 50% chance to succeed.

- Items gathered from Mining are automatically sent to your Bank.

- The Echo Pickaxe will cause the rock to not deplete until you have mined 4 ore.

- This buff does stack with the existing Mining Gloves, with a cap of 7 ores from a given node.

You will be able to toggle the following effects on or off for the Pickaxe:

- Collected ores are automatically smelted and grant Smithing XP (regardless of your smithing level).

- Gems gathered from Mining are automatically cut and grant Crafting XP regardless of your Crafting level.], None, [6665], None, None, None, None, None, None, None, None, [1117], None, None, [1]]
6948 reward_lumberjack 122 [[Lumberjack], [- This axe will act as a non-degradable variant of the crystal equivalent with no requirements.

- When this item is in your inventory or equipped, you gain the following perks:

- On failing to chop a tree, you will have a separate 50% chance to succeed.

- Items gathered from Woodcutting are automatically sent to your Bank.

You will be able to toggle the following effects on or off for the Axe:

- Automatically burning logs for Firemaking XP (regardless of your Firemaking level).

- Automatically Fletching logs into arrowshafts for Fletching XP (regardless of your Fletching level).

Additionally, you gain the following perks to <col=ffffff>Firemaking</col>:

- Never fail to make fires with any logs at any Firemaking level.], None, [6667], None, None, None, None, None, None, None, None, [1119], None, None, [1]]
6949 reward_animal_wrangler 122 [[Animal Wrangler], [- This harpoon will act as a non-degradable variant of the crystal equivalent with no requirements.

- When this item is in your inventory or equipped, you gain the following perks:

- On failing to fish a spot, you will have a separate 50% chance to succeed.

- Items gathered from Fishing are automatically sent to your Bank.

- Fish caught have a 50% chance to be automatically cooked, granting Cooking experience regardless of level requirements.

- Attempt to catch fish 1 tick faster.

- It will also work for fish that don't require a harpoon to be caught, and your harpoon can be substituted as a Net, Big Net, Lobster Pot, or any Rod whilst Fishing.

Alongside the Echo harpoon effects you will get the following perks to <col=ffffff>Hunter</col>:

- Hunter catching will never fail.

- Box traps catch chinchompas faster.

- Chinchompas are doubled when caught, also giving double XP.

- Impling jars no longer break upon opening them.

Lastly, you never burn food when Cooking.], None, [6666], None, None, None, None, None, None, None, None, [1118], None, None, [1]]
6950 reward_golden_god 122 [[Golden God], [You gain the following perks to the <col=ffffff>High and Low Alchemy spells</col>:

- The spells have no rune cost or level requirement.

- Items give 15% more gold, and have a 65% chance to not be consumed.

- When cast on a stack of items, the spells will automatically be recast over time, until the stack is depleted or moved.

You gain the following perks to <col=ffffff>Prayer</col>:

- 20, 000 Coins can be offered at Prayer altars in exchange for Prayer XP equivalent to using a dragon bone. This respects altar XP modifiers. Normal altars have no modifiers.

- All items purchased from some select shops can be noted, provided the item can be noted at all.
- There will be a new button on select shops which toggles this effect.], None, [6683], None, None, None, None, None, None, None, None, [1131], None, None, None]
6951 reward_dodgy_deals 122 [[Dodgy Deals], [You gain the following perks to <col=ffffff>Thieving</col>:

- Pickpocketing an NPC will also pickpocket all NPCs of similar type in a 11x11 square, granting extra loot for each NPC pickpocketed.

- 100% success rate on all Thieving checks.

- Automatically re-pickpocket an NPC or stall until you can no longer do so.

- Items obtained from pickpocketing are noted.

- Maximum coin pouch count increased by 3x.

- Stalls do not deplete when you steal from them.], None, [6673], None, None, None, None, None, None, None, None, [1125], None, None, None]
6952 reward_clue_compass 122 [[Clue Compass], [- This item will allow you to <col=ffffff>Teleport</col> to any S.T.A.S.H unit and Falo the Bard (Respecting area unlocks).

- It has the ability to teleport you to your current clue step, if you have one. Note - this will not work on clue steps that require you to kill a certain NPC.

- This item ignores wilderness teleport restrictions.

- This item cannot be used to teleport to an area you haven't unlocked.], None, [2532], None, None, None, None, None, None, None, None, [1120], None, None, None]
6953 reward_fairy_flight 122 [[Fairy's Flight], [- This item will allow you to <col=ffffff>Teleport</col> to any fairy ring, spirit tree, or tool leprechaun.

- Unlocking this will autocomplete the Tree Gnome Village quest.

- This item ignores wilderness teleport restrictions.

- This item cannot be used to teleport to an area you haven't unlocked.], None, [6668], None, None, None, None, None, None, None, None, [1725], None, None, None]
6954 reward_bankers_note 122 [[Banker's Note], [- This item will allow you to note and unnote items anywhere in Gielinor.

- You can manually use items on the Banker's Note to unnote or note them all, much like a Bank.

- The 'Activate' option allows you to note and unnote items in one action with a specified quantity. An object must first be used on the Banker's Note in order for this to work.

- You can customise how many items the Banker's note will note and unnote using the quantity options.], None, [6682], None, None, None, None, None, None, None, None, [4719], None, None, None]
6955 reward_production_prodigy 122 [[Production Prodigy], [- When doing the following activities, all items are processed at once:

- Smelting ores, Smithing bars (does not work with the Superheat item spell) and making Cannonballs.

- Fletching logs, stringing Bows and cutting bolt tips.

- Making headless arrows, regular arrows, bolts, darts, and javelins (capped at 10x the regular amount per action).

- Cleaning herbs and making Potions which do not have a stackable secondary ingredient.

- Cooking food and making Jugs of Wine.

- Crafting leather, uncut gems, glassblowing, jewellery, pottery, Battlestaves and spinning flax or wool.

- Full XP is given for items processed using this Relic.

- There is a 25% chance that you will make an extra product, which will be sent to your Bank if you have space. The additional product will also grant XP.

- Additionally Crafting, Smithing, Herblore, Fletching and Cooking are boosted by +12.], None, [6678], None, None, None, None, None, None, None, None, [1116], None, None, None]
6956 reward_last_recall 122 [[Total Recall], [- This item can be used to store any single coordinate, alongside your Hitpoints, Prayer and Special Attack Energy, and teleport back to it at a later date, restoring those stats to what they were.

- This item ignores wilderness teleport restrictions.

- The Crystal of Echoes cannot store coordinates whilst inside an instance.

- There are various other locations this item won't store coordinates in, including quest areas, certain minigames, etc.], None, [6680], None, None, None, None, None, None, None, None, [1130], None, None, None]
6957 reward_friendly_forager 122 [[Friendly Forager], [- This item will provide the following perks whilst in your inventory or equipped:

- When you gather resources from Woodcutting, Fishing, Mining and Hunting, the Forager's Pouch will find and store a random grimy herb, limited to herbs your herblore level + 25 can clean, whilst also providing a small amount of token XP when one is found.

- The Forager's Pouch will only find herbs it has room to store, but will always attempt to give you a herb you can receive.

- The Forager's Pouch works just like a Herb Sack, and shares an inventory with it.

Additionally, you gain the following perks to <col=ffffff>Herblore</col> when crafting potions:

- Secondary ingredients have a 90% chance to not be consumed. This stacks additively with other sources.

- Created potions contain 4 doses instead of 3.], None, [6672], None, None, None, None, None, None, None, None, [1124], None, None, None]
6958 reward_corner_cutter 122 [[Corner Cutter], [- While equipped, Sage's Greaves will grant Agility XP based on your Agility level while you run.

- Completing an Agility course grants two completion count and 25% bonus XP.

- 100% success rate on all Agility checks.

- Marks of Grace will also spawn with 10, 000 coins.

- Double Quantity of Pyramid Tops, Hallowed Marks and Agility Vouchers, and Crystal shards (from agility).], None, [6671], None, None, None, None, None, None, None, None, [1123], None, None, None]
6959 reward_unnatural_selection 122 [[Unnatural Selection], [Choose your own slayer assignments.], None, [2532], None, None, None, None, None, None, None, None, [729], None, None, None]
6960 reward_last_stand 122 [[Last Stand], [You gain the <col=ffffff>Last Stand</col> perk, which works as follows:

- If damage would reduce you to 0 hp, you are reduced to 1 hp instead.

- Your combat stats are instantly boosted to 255 but begin draining rapidly back down to their base level + 15.

- For the next 16 ticks after this ability is activated, you cannot be reduced to 0 HP.

- When the effect ends, all incoming damage is nullified and the player is healed based on the damage they dealt over the last 16 ticks.

Once this ability is used, it cannot be used again until you die or 3 minutes have passed.], None, [6688], None, None, None, None, None, None, None, None, [1135], None, None, None]
6961 reward_slayer_master 122 [[Slayer Master], [Always be on-task for all slayer monsters and unlock all slayer task perks for free.], None, [6679], None, None, None, None, None, None, None, None, [1129], None, None, None]
6962 reward_grimoire 122 [[Grimoire], [- This item can be used to freely swap between spellbooks.

- The Grimoire acts as a Book of the Dead.

Additionally, when you select this, you will unlock access to all Prayers and spells, regardless of area, quest, or diary requirements.], None, [6684], None, None, None, None, None, None, None, None, [1132], None, None, None]
6963 reward_specialist 122 [[Specialist], [You gain the following perks to <col=ffffff>special attacks</col>:

- All special attacks cost 20% and have +100% accuracy.

- For each failed accuracy roll with a special attack, gain 10% Special Attack Energy.

- Whenever you kill an NPC, restore 15% Special Attack Energy.], None, [6686], None, None, None, None, None, None, None, None, [1134], None, None, None]
6964 reward_bank_heist 122 [[Bank Heist], [Gain the Banker's Briefcase, which can teleport to any deposit box, bank, or bank chest.], None, [6669], None, None, None, None, None, None, None, None, [1121], None, None, None]
6965 reward_guardian 122 [[Guardian], [- This item will allow you to summon a powerful <col=ffffff>Guardian Thrall</col>, lasting 30 minutes.

- The guardian will attack your target with whatever style it is weak to.

- When you are in multi-combat it will cast an AoE attack if the target is weak to range or magic.

- The Guardian's stats are:
- Min hit: 5
- Max hit: 13
- Attack Speed: 4
- Accuracy: 45000

- The Guardian does not work in PvP.

- This perk will also work inside The Gauntlet.], None, [6689], None, None, None, None, None, None, None, None, [4728], None, None, None]
6966 reward_bottomless_brew 122 [[Bottomless Brew], [You gain the <col=ffffff>Bottomless Brew</col> perk.
Potions will no longer be consumed when you drink them.], None, [6676], None, None, None, None, None, None, None, None, [6263], None, None, None]
6967 reward_spells_do_not_consume_runes 122 [[Rune Saviour], [Magic spells no longer require or consume Runes. This includes charges when using powered staves or tomes.], None, [6670], None, None, None, None, None, None, None, None, [6260], None, None, None]
6968 reward_minimum_potential 122 [[Minimum Potential], [You gain the <col=ffffff>Minimum Potential</col> perk. Your Melee, Ranged & Magic hits will never deal below 5 damage.], None, [6685], None, None, None, None, None, None, None, None, [6261], None, None, None]
6969 reward_spiky_aura 122 [[Spiky Aura], [You reflect at least 25% of damage received. This effect stacks with other recoil effects.], None, [6687], None, None, None, None, None, None, None, None, [6262], None, None, None]
6970 reward_gatherer 122 [[Gatherer], [You gain the Gatherer benefit. You select three Gathering or Support skills, then whenever you gain XP in one of your 3 selected Gathering or Support skills, you'll gain 50% of that XP in the other 2 selected skills.

Available skills are: Mining, Fishing, Woodcutting, Hunter, Agility, Slayer and Thieving.], None, None, None, None, None, None, [31216, 1], None, None, None, None, None, [1], None]
6971 reward_craftsman 122 [[Craftsman], [You gain the Craftsman benefit. You select three Artisan skills, then whenever you gain XP in one of your 3 selected Craftsman skills, you'll gain 50% of that XP in the other 2 selected skills.

Available skills are: Construction, Cooking, Crafting, Firemaking, Fletching, Herblore, Runecraft and Smithing.], None, None, None, None, None, None, [31214, 1], None, None, None, None, None, [1], None]
6972 reward_combatant 122 [[Combatant], [You gain the Combatant benefit. You select three Combat skills, then whenever you gain XP in one of your 3 selected Combat skills, you'll gain 50% of that XP in the other 2 selected skills.

Available skills are: Attack, Strength, Defence, Hitpoints, Ranged, Magic and Prayer.], None, None, None, None, None, None, [31212, 1], None, None, None, None, None, [1], None]
6973 reward_battlehat 122 [[Battlehat], [A tribrid helmet with no negative bonuses, that also functions as a slayer helm.], [1], None, None, None, None, None, [31172, 1], None, None, None, None, None, [1], None]
6974 reward_corrupted_shark 122 [[Corrupted Shark], [A Shark that isn't consumed when eaten.
Heals a base of 20 hitpoints.], None, [6677], None, None, None, None, [31174, 1], None, None, None, None, None, [1], None]
6975 reward_farmers_fortune 122 [[Farmer's Fortune], [- You will harvest patches at a rate of up to 20x per action, noting any contents you receive.

- All patches will give 3x the yield.

- Farming patches grow instantly.

- Your plants will never die.

- You have a 20%~ chance to not use a seed or sapling when planting items in patches.], None, [6691], None, None, None, None, None, None, None, None, [4722], None, None, None]
6976 reward_crit_all_styles 122 [[Exposure], [You gain the <col=ffffff>Exposure</col> perk. Special attacks have a 50% chance to deal 50% more damage.], None, [6690], None, None, None, None, None, None, None, None, [6264], None, None, None]
6977 reward_increase_all_combat_masteries 122 [[+1 All Combat Masteries], [Gain a tier in all Combat Masteries.], [1], [6752], None, None, None, None, None, None, None, None, None, [3, 1, 4, 1, 5, 1], None, None]
6978 reward_auto_complete_all_achievement_diaries 122 [[All Achievement Diaries], [Auto complete all achievement diaries.], None, None, None, None, None, None, None, None, [4], None, None, None, None, None]
6979 reward_auto_complete_all_combat_achievements 122 [[All Combat Achievements], [Auto complete all combat achievements.], None, None, None, None, None, None, None, None, None, [6], None, None, None, None]
